prestazioni: N54B30TO (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) upgraded with a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285S turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe and a CSF Racing N54-specific front-mount intercooler (bar-and-plate core, 5.5" thick, 22" x 6.5" x 3.5") for sustained 1.5-bar boost in drift applications

Full Doc Race Motorsports N54 closed-deck block reinforcement kit (billet main caps, ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs, and deck plate honing) with a forged crankshaft (2.5mm stroke increase via a Manley Performance stroker kit) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression, coated skirts, and 1.2mm wall thickness) for 450whp+ reliability under prolonged lateral load

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (1M-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound, and 30mm front/25mm rear adjustable ride height) with Hardrace Motorsport adjustable pillowball upper mounts (front) and polyurethane subframe bushings (rear) to eliminate deflection during aggressive weight transfer
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (1M-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, and 30mm extended rear quarter panels) with custom 50mm extended overfenders to accommodate 10.5" front/12" rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels (ET18 front, ET-12 rear, 18x10.5/+30 and 18x12/-12 fitment) and 265/35R18 front/285/35R18 rear Federal 595 RS-RR tires

Custom carbon fiber front splitter (1M-specific, 3-piece design with integrated air curtains) and a GT3-style rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3D-printed internal strakes) from 991 Motorsport, paired with a custom 3M 2080 series vinyl wrap in BMW Individual Frozen Grey (matte finish with satin clear coat)

Recaro SPG XL Kevlar bucket seats (1M-specific mounting brackets, Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses) with a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point main hoop, gusseted rear struts, and integrated harness bar) from AutoPower Industries, finished in satin black powder coat with red accent stitching on the Sparco 600 steering wheel
